name: Tortas De Camaron (Shrimp Fritters)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup dehydrated shrimp (found in Asian or Mexican markets)
2 cups bread crumbs or tortilla crumbs
recipeInstructions:
To make tortilla crumbs, dry tortillas (about 12) in an oven on low heat until crisp. Grind up in a food processor or blender.
Mix dried shrimps, bread crumbs and tortilla crumbs in a blender or processor container. Process until the shrimps are ground up and well blended with crumbs. Empty into a bowl, and add eggs, one at a time, until you have a batter the consistency of cooked oatmeal.
Heat enough oil in a skillet to about 1/4 inch deep. Drop a tablespoonful of batter for each fritter, and fry until golden brown, turning once.
Serve on top of Nopales Guisados.
